Off Calendar Nov-19-2008 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-12-2008 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jan-13-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200 Et Seq. And 15401 Et Seq. To Determine Validity If Amendm
Off Calendar Sep-22-2008 Off Calendar

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200 Et Seq. And 15401 Et Seq. To Determine Validity If Amendm
Off Calendar Jun-02-2008 Continued To Sep-22-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Matthew Wertheim for Debra Reed (Respondent). Lori Arnold for James Reed (Petitiioner).

Mr. Wertheim stated that they were willing to mediate by September 15th and requested a trial be set by mid November. The Court signed the order referring the matter to mediation. Mediation is to be completed by September 15, 2008. Status on mediation is set for September 22, 2008. The matter was referred to the department of the Presiding Judge to be set for trial.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Lazatin.

Petition Under Probate Code Sections 17200 Et Seq. And 15401 Et Seq. To Determine Validity If Amendm
Off Calendar Mar-03-2008 Continued To Jun-02-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Hilliard for Petitioner James Reed, Matthew Wertheim for Respondent Deborah Reed.
Mr. Hilliard requested a continuance to complete the discovery issue. No objection was made by Mr. Wertheim.
Parties elected to complete discovery before attending mediation.
The matter was continued to June 2, 2008 for status on discovery and status on the petition.
Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan. Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR#8098. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Larazin.
